headline: Northern Trust Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher NII & AUM Growth
summary: NTRS Q1 results benefit from higher net interest income and strong AUM and AUC growth amid rising expenses.

headline: Bank of Hawaii Q1 Earnings Miss on Lower Fee Income, Expenses Rise Y/Y
summary: BOH Q1 earnings miss estimates as fee income drops and expenses rise, but higher NII, loan growth and improved credit quality provide partial support.
